name: Implement retry logic for API calls
description: The `fetch_data` function in src/api.rs makes a single API call. If the call fails with a transient error (timeout, 5xx, network), it should retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s). If all retries fail, return an appropriate error. The function should use the Result<T, Error> pattern.

files.src/lib.rs:
pub mod api;

pub use api::{fetch_data, ApiError};
